name: Open Design
description: Sidecar bridge to Open Design (nexu-io/open-design) — local-first design product that turns 16 coding-agent CLIs into a design engine driven by skills + design systems. The plugin manages the open-design daemon lifecycle from inside OpenComputer: `oc design start|stop|status|url|restart`. A Design tab in the Hermes Workspace iframes the daemon's web UI on port 7456.
author: OpenComputer Contributors
